title: SensorDataPayload
description: Schema for IoT sensor data pushed by hardware team. Supports: rain detection sensor, moisture sensor, wind speed sensor, tiltometer.

sensor_id.description: Unique identifier for the sensor node

rain_detected.description: Rain detection sensor — true if rain is currently detected

rainfall_mm.description: Rainfall accumulation in millimeters (from tipping bucket or gauge)

moisture_pct.description: Soil moisture percentage from moisture sensor

wind_speed_kmh.description: Wind speed in km/h from wind speed detection sensor

tilt_deg.description: Ground/slope tilt angle in degrees from tiltometer
